zh.Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾吉爾培可
zh.Longford, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾隆福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Kilpek於大約1213年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Hugh de Kilpeck35歲，母親Egidia Marmion31歲。她於1232年與William Waleran在英國維爾爾隆福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年在英國英格蘭維爾爾隆福德享年72歲。

zh-hans.Longford, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾隆福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Kilpek于大约1213年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Kilpeck35岁，母亲Egidia Marmion31岁。她于1232年与William Waleran在英国維爾爾隆福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年在英国英格兰維爾爾隆福德享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Kilpek was born about 1213, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Kilpeck, was 35 and her mother, Egidia Marmion, was 31. She married William Waleran in 1232, in Longford, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1284, in Longford, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Kilpek est née environ 1213, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Kilpeck, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Egidia Marmion, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Waleran en 1232, à Longford, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1284, à Longford, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Kilpek um 1213 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Kilpeck 35 und ihre Mutter Egidia Marmion 31. Sie hat 1232 in Longford, Wiltshire, England William Waleran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Longford, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Kilpek è nata il circa 1213 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Kilpeck, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Egidia Marmion, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Waleran nel 1232, nel Longford, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel Longford, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Kilpekが約1213年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Kilpeckは35歳，母Egidia Marmionは31歳であった。1232年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアロングフォードでWilliam Waleranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアロングフォードで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Kilpek(이)가 대략 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Kilpeck(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Marmion(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1232년 영국 윌츠히르 론그퍼드에서 William Waleran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 론그퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Kilpek nasceu aproximadamente 1213, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Kilpeck, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Marmion, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Waleran em 1232, em Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1284, em Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Kilpek родилась около 1213 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Kilpeck было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Marmion, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Waleran в 1232 г. в местности лонгфорд, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1284 г. в местности лонгфорд, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Kilpek nació aproximadamente 1213, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Kilpeck, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Egidia Marmion, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Waleran en 1232, en Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1284, en Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
